executive_summary: Overnight risk remains centered on browser exploitation, cloud identity pressure, and vendor/service reliability that could affect MSP client operations.
security_1: Chrome zero-day patching remains high priority
security_2: Credential theft and phishing pressure remain elevated
tech_2: Vendor reliability and outage posture remain key watch items
msp_impact: MSPs should prioritize browser patching, identity monitoring, and vendor dependency awareness across client environments.
action_2: Review high-risk identity and endpoint alerts
action_3: Watch major vendor status pages for disruption
